commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8dbaedde2c17364eb13bddfe39b9fc27499370e7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes memory-core shadow database cleanup attempt every SQLite sidecar, rethrow the first cleanup error, and adds regression tests for direct and aged-orphan cleanup paths.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +64. Total +80 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows PR head makes aged cleanup throw, and the new test explicitly expects that throwing path; I did not run a live Windows filesystem reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author or maintainer follow-up for a blocking runtime regression and refreshed real behavior proof; ClawSweeper repair is not queued because automation cannot provide the contributor's current-head proof.

target.title: fix(memory): keep cleaning reindex sidecars after lock errors

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
